h1.visual_description: Bold, larger serif font, typically centered or left-aligned at the start of major sections.

h2.visual_description: Bold, standard-sized serif font, used for numbered sub-sections.

visual_matchers.pattern: Italicized text within a citation block
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Publication venue (e.g., journal name, conference proceedings, or 'arXiv preprint')
Hyperlink to an external technical report or digital resource
Unique identifier for a preprint on the arXiv repository
Individual bibliographic entry in a reference list

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: No headers, footers, or page numbers are visible on this specific sample page.
